rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in a grouped parenthetical citation with Huettel and Payne (2009), to support a general background claim about neural sources of stochasticity in choice behavior. The citing paper does not discuss Yoon et al.'s specific arguments, methods, or recommendations, and it does not build hypotheses or analyses directly from that article. The substantive conceptual and methodological backbone is drawn from other works (e.g., Levy et al. 2011; Webb et al. 2013), so this citation functions as contextual literature support.
